commit_scope: Promote the presence resonance relationship read family into the BML native front door: GET /api/concepts/{concept_id}/carried-by and GET /api/presences/{presence_id}/resonances.

commands: tmp="$(mktemp)"; git show origin/main:deploy/front-door/api.bml > "$tmp"; form/form-kernel-rust/target/release/form-kernel-rust check --routes "$tmp" --stdlib form/form-stdlib; rc=$?; rm -f "$tmp"; exit $rc
local_validation.notes: Before this slice, runtime_surface_report showed 87 kernel-first-capable routes and /goal identified GET /api/concepts/lc-ceremony/carried-by plus GET /api/presences/asset:audible-B00DVN8U82/resonances as sparse python-fanout candidates. After the BML family promotion, runtime_surface_report shows 89 capable routes and includes /api/concepts/{concept_id}/carried-by plus /api/presences/{presence_id}/resonances. Static deploy path guard passed. Focused runtime-surface/provenance tests passed. The generic form-kernel-rust check --routes command still reports the same 14 unresolved names on both this branch and origin/main, so that is pre-existing catalog debt rather than a regression from this patch. A live local DB-backed native curl was not run because Docker was not running and no local Postgres listener was available; the default local API config is SQLite while these BML handlers use the Rust Postgres carrier.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR creation, hosted checks, merge, and post-merge deploy verification.

deploy_validation.notes: This branch has not yet been deployed. Post-merge verification must show public GET /api/concepts/lc-ceremony/carried-by and GET /api/presences/asset:audible-B00DVN8U82/resonances return X-Form-Router:native-kernel, the expected X-Form-Handler values, X-Form-Python-Authority:false, and {items,count} JSON bodies.

phase_gate.reason: Local static/source-surface proof passed; hosted CI, merge, production deploy, and public native header proof remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The two presence resonance relationship reads become BML native front-door routes with the same {items,count} response shape as the Python authority, while mutation/attune routes remain Python-served.
e2e_validation.proof: runtime_surface_report now reports kernel_first_capable_routes=89 and includes both promoted relationship read patterns. Focused runtime-surface tests pin both paths. Deploy/static guards require Traefik labels, deploy canaries, public verifier routes, and native proof headers for both handlers.
test_flows: Static deploy path test fails if the new Traefik labels, deploy canary handlers, or BML native proof handlers are removed.
Public deploy verifier now checks both promoted relationship reads for native proof headers and {items,count} body shape.
Runtime surface unit test pins both new BML route patterns as kernel-first capable.

evidence_refs: python3 scripts/native_route_goal_loop.py /goal --source web_api --seconds 86400 identified GET /api/concepts/lc-ceremony/carried-by and GET /api/presences/asset:audible-B00DVN8U82/resonances as next observed python-fanout route candidates.
python3 scripts/runtime_surface_report.py --json reported kernel_first_capable_routes=89 and included both promoted route patterns.
form-kernel-rust check --routes reports the same 14 unresolved names on this branch and origin/main; no new unresolved symbol was introduced by this route family.
